description.preview: This is a browser preview. It shows structure only and does not reflect the real local state.
description.runtimeUnavailable: You are already in the desktop window, but the frontend has not connected to the runtime bridge yet. Fix that before continuing with install and configuration.
description.default: This page shows which step you should do next.

loading.title: Preparing setup guidance
loading.description: Checking which step you should do first.

error.title: Unable to enter setup guidance
error.description: We could not determine the next step. You can open the overview or install page first.

entry.title: First-run navigation
entry.description: The app checks the environment first, then walks you through install, configuration, and Gateway startup in order.
entry.noticeDescription: We have already lined up the next step. Continue with the buttons below, and review the other pages later.
entry.noticePrimaryHint: Once you finish {{step}}, the app will move you to the next step.

actionList.title: Next step
actionList.description: Only do the first item that matches the current state, then continue to the next one.
